query:
SELECT c.conv_id
        FROM Conversations c
        JOIN Conversation_participants cp1 ON c.conv_id = cp1.conv_id
        JOIN Conversation_participants cp2 ON c.conv_id = cp2.conv_id
        WHERE cp1.user_id = $1 
          AND cp2.user_id = $2 
          AND c.is_group = false
        LIMIT 1
